intro: Parsonsia inodora, also known as the "Australian Dogwood", is a plant species native to Australia and New Caledonia. The health benefits of Parsonsia inodora include its antimicrobial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions.
